issue: Task explicitly names "nova" but haus.laravel-nova-patterns is skipped because the repo lacks the laravel-nova-app role. The task router therefore cannot surface Nova-specific guidance.
expected: Either (a) the recommender allows opt-in selection of a tag-matched rule when the task strongly references it, or (b) explain output makes the skip reason actionable ("add laravel/nova to deps to enable Nova rules").
rootCauseHypothesis: Skip is gated only on `laravel-nova-app` role detection; the task signal is ignored at recommend time and the context filter cannot re-add a skipped rule.
